mapper.sql: homepage_id, user_id, template_type, layout_mode, theme_config, custom_code_draft, media_layout_draft, published_template_type, published_layout_mode, published_theme_config, published_custom_code, published_media_layout, published_version, review_status, submitted_at, review_deadline_at, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, review_comment, community_template_id, created_time, updated_time

d.design_id, d.author_id, d.source_homepage_id, d.title, d.summary, d.template_type, d.layout_mode, d.theme_config, d.custom_code, d.media_layout, d.status, d.submitted_at, d.review_deadline_at, d.reviewed_by, d.reviewed_at, d.review_comment, d.clone_count, d.like_count, d.favorite_count, d.comment_count, d.created_time, d.updated_time, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.display_name, ''), u.username) AS author_name, u.avatar_url AS author_avatar_url
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_homepages ( user_id, template_type, layout_mode, theme_config, custom_code_draft, media_layout_draft, published_template_type, published_layout_mode, published_theme_config, published_custom_code, published_media_layout, published_version, review_status, community_template_id ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{templateType}, #{layoutMode}, #{themeConfig}, #{customCodeDraft}, #{mediaLayoutDraft}, #{publishedTemplateType}, #{publishedLayoutMode}, #{publishedThemeConfig}, #{publishedCustomCode}, #{publishedMediaLayout}, COALESCE(#{publishedVersion}, 0), #{reviewStatus}, #{communityTemplateId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE user_homepages SET template_type = #{templateType}, layout_mode = #{layoutMode}, theme_config = #{themeConfig}, custom_code_draft = #{customCodeDraft}, media_layout_draft = #{mediaLayoutDraft}, review_status = 'DRAFT', submitted_at = NULL, review_deadline_at = NULL, reviewed_by = NULL, reviewed_at = NULL, review_comment = '', community_template_id = #{communityTemplateId} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepageId}

UPDATE user_homepages SET review_status = 'PENDING_REVIEW', submitted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, review_deadline_at = DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 48 HOUR), reviewed_by = NULL, reviewed_at = NULL, review_comment = '' WHERE homepage_id = #{homepageId}

UPDATE user_homepages SET published_template_type = template_type, published_layout_mode = layout_mode, published_theme_config = theme_config, published_custom_code = custom_code_draft, published_media_layout = media_layout_draft, published_version = published_version + 1, review_status = 'APPROVED', reviewed_by = #{adminId}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, review_comment = #{remark} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepageId}
UPDATE user_homepages SET review_status = 'REJECTED', reviewed_by = #{adminId}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, review_comment = #{remark} WHERE homepage_id = #{homepageId}
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM community_homepage_designs d JOIN users u ON u.user_id = d.author_id WHERE d.design_id = #{designId}

SELECT
FROM community_homepage_designs d JOIN users u ON u.user_id = d.author_id WHERE d.status = 'APPROVED'
AND ( d.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.summary LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.display_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY d.created_time DESC, d.design_id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO community_homepage_designs ( author_id, source_homepage_id, title, summary, template_type, layout_mode, theme_config, custom_code, media_layout, status, submitted_at, review_deadline_at, review_comment ) VALUES ( #{authorId}, #{sourceHomepageId}, #{title}, #{summary}, #{templateType}, #{layoutMode}, #{themeConfig}, #{customCode}, #{mediaLayout}, #{status}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, DATE_ADD(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, INTERVAL 48 HOUR), #{reviewComment} )
mapper.update: UPDATE community_homepage_designs SET status = 'APPROVED', reviewed_by = #{adminId}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, review_comment = #{remark} WHERE design_id = #{designId}
UPDATE community_homepage_designs SET status = 'REJECTED', reviewed_by = #{adminId}, reviewed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, review_comment = #{remark} WHERE design_id = #{designId}
mapper.sql: SELECT 'USER_HOMEPAGE' AS targetType, uh.homepage_id AS targetId, uh.user_id AS ownerId, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.display_name, ''), u.username) AS ownerName, u.avatar_url AS ownerAvatarUrl, CONCAT(COALESCE(NULLIF(u.display_name, ''), u.username), ' Homepage') AS title, 'Personal homepage draft submitted for review.' AS summary, uh.template_type AS templateType, uh.layout_mode AS layoutMode, uh.theme_config AS themeConfig, uh.custom_code_draft AS customCode, uh.media_layout_draft AS mediaLayout, uh.review_status AS reviewStatus, uh.submitted_at AS submittedAt, uh.review_deadline_at AS reviewDeadlineAt, uh.review_comment AS reviewComment, CASE WHEN uh.review_status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' AND uh.review_deadline_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS overdue FROM user_homepages uh JOIN users u ON u.user_id = uh.user_id UNION ALL SELECT 'COMMUNITY_DESIGN' AS targetType, d.design_id AS targetId, d.author_id AS ownerId, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.display_name, ''), u.username) AS ownerName, u.avatar_url AS ownerAvatarUrl, d.title AS title, d.summary AS summary, d.template_type AS templateType, d.layout_mode AS layoutMode, d.theme_config AS themeConfig, d.custom_code AS customCode, d.media_layout AS mediaLayout, d.status AS reviewStatus, d.submitted_at AS submittedAt, d.review_deadline_at AS reviewDeadlineAt, d.review_comment AS reviewComment, CASE WHEN d.status = 'PENDING_REVIEW' AND d.review_deadline_at < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS overdue FROM community_homepage_designs d JOIN users u ON u.user_id = d.author_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO admin_audit_logs ( admin_id, target_type, target_id, action_type, remark ) VALUES ( #{adminId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{actionType}, #{remark} )
